texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Oldarpoi Mara Camp (hereinafter called OMC) Terms & Conditions
texts.text: Oldarpoi Mara Camp (hereinafter called OMC) Terms & Conditions

texts.label: text
texts.orig: (All General Terms & Conditions of OMC Apply)
texts.text: (All General Terms & Conditions of OMC Apply)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1. Jurisdiction
texts.text: 1. Jurisdiction

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Agreement and its interpretation shall be subject to the laws of Kenya.
texts.text: This Agreement and its interpretation shall be subject to the laws of Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Government Taxes
texts.text: Government Taxes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rates quoted include VAT, Service Charge & Hotel Training Levy where applicable. Should the Government increase, decrease or introduce new taxes, OMC reserves the right to renegotiate the rates of this Agreement accordingly.
texts.text: All rates quoted include VAT, Service Charge & Hotel Training Levy where applicable. Should the Government increase, decrease or introduce new taxes, OMC reserves the right to renegotiate the rates of this Agreement accordingly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. Exchange Rates
texts.text: 3. Exchange Rates

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should the exchange rate of the currency of this contract (USD) and Kenya Shilling change    considerably, OMC reserves the right to renegotiate the rates, an addition of 10% of this Agreement accordingly.
texts.text: Should the exchange rate of the currency of this contract (USD) and Kenya Shilling change    considerably, OMC reserves the right to renegotiate the rates, an addition of 10% of this Agreement accordingly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. Group Bookings
texts.text: 4. Group Bookings

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 4.1 Group bookings, scheduled tour series/incentive groups, block bookings, are to be re-confirmed (in writing) by the Agent not less than 15 days prior to the arrival date at OMC and the written reconfirmation notice should be accompanied by
texts.text: 4.1 Group bookings, scheduled tour series/incentive groups, block bookings, are to be re-confirmed (in writing) by the Agent not less than 15 days prior to the arrival date at OMC and the written reconfirmation notice should be accompanied by

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (i) A confirmation voucher (physical amendments by drivers etc will not be   acceptable),
texts.text: (i) A confirmation voucher (physical amendments by drivers etc will not be   acceptable),

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (ii) Rooming list. Failure to do so will render a booking void and OMC will have the right to release rooms without notice to the Agent after such period (i.e. 15 days prior to date of booking rooms will be released).
texts.text: (ii) Rooming list. Failure to do so will render a booking void and OMC will have the right to release rooms without notice to the Agent after such period (i.e. 15 days prior to date of booking rooms will be released).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 4.2 Should OMC receive a second enquiry where another group is prepared to make a firm commitment for the space prior to the Agent's acceptance/Confirmation Voucher, OMC reserves the right to contact the Agent for a signed confirmation voucher within 2 days & or demand a minimum of 50% deposit in order to secure the agents booking. In the event the deposit is demanded, this must be paid within 5 working days of  such demand being made in writing.
texts.text: 4.2 Should OMC receive a second enquiry where another group is prepared to make a firm commitment for the space prior to the Agent's acceptance/Confirmation Voucher, OMC reserves the right to contact the Agent for a signed confirmation voucher within 2 days & or demand a minimum of 50% deposit in order to secure the agents booking. In the event the deposit is demanded, this must be paid within 5 working days of  such demand being made in writing.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 4.3 For groups of 20 pax plus a non-refundable deposit of 50% must be paid to OMC prior to confirmation  & at least 35 days prior to arrival date at OMC in order to secure the rooms.
texts.text: 4.3 For groups of 20 pax plus a non-refundable deposit of 50% must be paid to OMC prior to confirmation  & at least 35 days prior to arrival date at OMC in order to secure the rooms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If, for any reason, and unless otherwise confirmed in writing by OMC, accommodation is not secured by the means outlined above; OMC will have the right to sell/release these rooms with immediate effect.
texts.text: If, for any reason, and unless otherwise confirmed in writing by OMC, accommodation is not secured by the means outlined above; OMC will have the right to sell/release these rooms with immediate effect.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5. Cancellations and No-Shows
texts.text: 5. Cancellations and No-Shows

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length or stay or reduced in numbers (herein after collectively called Cancellation) are subject to the following cancellation and No-show Fees (cancellations must be confirmed in writing to OMC Central Reservations Office in Nairobi and as maybe advised from time to time by OMC):
texts.text: Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length or stay or reduced in numbers (herein after collectively called Cancellation) are subject to the following cancellation and No-show Fees (cancellations must be confirmed in writing to OMC Central Reservations Office in Nairobi and as maybe advised from time to time by OMC):

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.1 Cancellation GREATER than 45 Days: No cancelation charges will be incurred
texts.text: 5.1 Cancellation GREATER than 45 Days: No cancelation charges will be incurred

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.2 Cancellation between 44 to 39 days: 20% of the contract rate
texts.text: 5.2 Cancellation between 44 to 39 days: 20% of the contract rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.3 Cancellation between 38 to 8 days: 50% of the contract rate.
texts.text: 5.3 Cancellation between 38 to 8 days: 50% of the contract rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.4 Cancellation between 1 to 7 days prior to arrival, no show and under stay: 100% of the contract rate. Please note: For groups that have paid a non-refundable deposit, the cancellation charges above will apply to  the remaining balance only.
texts.text: 5.4 Cancellation between 1 to 7 days prior to arrival, no show and under stay: 100% of the contract rate. Please note: For groups that have paid a non-refundable deposit, the cancellation charges above will apply to  the remaining balance only.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.5 All no shows will result in a cancellation of all complimentary granted, and no credit note shall be issued
texts.text: 5.5 All no shows will result in a cancellation of all complimentary granted, and no credit note shall be issued

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6. Early Departure Fees
texts.text: 6. Early Departure Fees

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should an individual or group depart earlier than the confirmed departure date, a fee of 100% of the group/individual/contract rate will apply for each night thereafter of the confirmed booking.
texts.text: Should an individual or group depart earlier than the confirmed departure date, a fee of 100% of the group/individual/contract rate will apply for each night thereafter of the confirmed booking.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8. Check-in/Check-out
texts.text: 8. Check-in/Check-out

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12:00 pm on the scheduled date of arrival. Rooms should be vacated by 10:00 am on the scheduled date of departure; late departure times may be considered subject to anticipated arrivals. (Please note: All guests must settle their accounts for extras in full by either cash [Kenyan shillings or US Dollars] or credit card [Visa or MasterCard only] or Via MPESA Till [Buy Goods] on check-out.) OMC does not accept liability for any omissions or errors and reserves the right at any time to change information published on its marketing collateral (e.g. website, brochures, online platforms etc.). Guest Property/Conduct - All guests' property etc. is the sole responsibility of the guest, unless placed in the hotel Reception. Guest's vehicles including contents are left on the hotel site at the vehicle owner's sole responsibility. Anti-social behavior will not be tolerated and persons involved will be asked to leave. If there is anything that a guest is dissatisfied with relating to service or product at OMC, it is advised that the guest/s inform the General Manager immediately so that the matter is dealt with/resolved accordingly. Members of staff are unable to authorize credit or refunds. Damages - Any damages to the hotel property by your guests will be charged for in full, for the cost of cleaning, repair and/or replacing, along with any lost revenue of rooms awaiting attention. This will be the liability of the Agent, who will be responsible for collecting payment, if necessary, from their guest/s. Valuables - Any valuables left at the property are the guest's sole responsibility. Neither the lodge nor the

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 10. Force Majeure Suspension Clause
texts.text: 10. Force Majeure Suspension Clause

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The obligations of OMC under this agreement shall be suspended while they are prevented or hindered by force majeure, including but not limited to strike, lock downs, labour and civil disturbances, acts of God, unavoidable accidents, threats of war, pandemics, terrorism, industrial dispute, natural or nuclear disaster, laws, rules, regulations or orders of any Government or any National Municipal or other Government Agency, whether domestic or foreign, wars or other matters beyond the reasonable control of OMC.
texts.text: The obligations of OMC under this agreement shall be suspended while they are prevented or hindered by force majeure, including but not limited to strike, lock downs, labour and civil disturbances, acts of God, unavoidable accidents, threats of war, pandemics, terrorism, industrial dispute, natural or nuclear disaster, laws, rules, regulations or orders of any Government or any National Municipal or other Government Agency, whether domestic or foreign, wars or other matters beyond the reasonable control of OMC.
